inputs.label: Density
inputs.businessContext: The density of the material in grams per cubic centimeter.

businessContext_i18n.en: The density of the material in grams per cubic centimeter.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Malzemenin santimetreküp başına gram cinsinden yoğunluğu.
businessContext_i18n.de: Die Dichte des Materials in Gramm pro Kubikzentimeter.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Densité du matériau en grammes par centimètre cube.
businessContext_i18n.es: Densidad del material en gramos por centímetro cúbico.

inputs.label: Molar Mass
inputs.businessContext: The molar mass of the element in grams per mole.

businessContext_i18n.en: The molar mass of the element in grams per mole.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Elementin mol başına gram cinsinden molar kütlesi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Die molare Masse des Elements in Gramm pro Mol.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Masse molaire de l'élément en grammes par mole.
businessContext_i18n.es: Masa molar del elemento en gramos por mol.

inputs.label: Crystal Structure
inputs.businessContext: Crystal structure index: 0=Custom packing factor, 1=Simple Cubic, 2=BCC, 3=FCC, 4=HCP.

businessContext_i18n.en: Crystal structure index: 0=Custom packing factor, 1=Simple Cubic, 2=BCC, 3=FCC, 4=HCP.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kristal yapı indeksi: 0=Özel paketleme faktörü, 1=Basit Kübik, 2=HMK, 3=YMK, 4=HDP.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Indice de structure cristalline : 0=Facteur de tassement personnalisé, 1=Cubique simple, 2=CC, 3=CFC, 4=HC.
businessContext_i18n.es: Índice de estructura cristalina: 0=Factor de empaquetamiento personalizado, 1=Cúbica simple, 2=BCC, 3=FCC, 4=HCP.

inputs.label: Custom Packing Factor
inputs.businessContext: Used only if structure type is 0. Typical values: 0.52 (SC), 0.68 (BCC), 0.74 (FCC/HCP).

businessContext_i18n.en: Used only if structure type is 0. Typical values: 0.52 (SC), 0.68 (BCC), 0.74 (FCC/HCP).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yalnızca yapı türü 0 ise kullanılır. Tipik değerler: 0.52 (BK), 0.68 (HMK), 0.74 (YMK/HDP).
businessContext_i18n.de: Wird nur verwendet, wenn der Strukturtyp 0 ist. Typische Werte: 0,52 (kubisch primitiv), 0,68 (krz), 0,74 (kfz/hexagonal).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Utilisé uniquement si le type de structure est 0. Valeurs typiques : 0,52 (CS), 0,68 (CC), 0,74 (CFC/HC).
businessContext_i18n.es: Se usa solo si el tipo de estructura es 0. Valores típicos: 0.52 (CS), 0.68 (BCC), 0.74 (FCC/HCP).

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
